name: maxtac-supply-chains
description: Supply-chain, package, CI/CD, provenance, container, and release-pipeline research pack for MaxTAC.

interface.longDescription: MaxTAC for Supply Chains adds dependency, package-manager, CI/CD, artifact provenance, signing, container, registry, and release-pipeline triage plus supply-chain auditor routing.
defaultPrompt: Use MaxTAC for Supply Chains to triage this build or release path.
Map this package or CI/CD trust boundary with MaxTAC.
